content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and `HMHomeManager()` instantiated in App/WallpaperGridView.swift:2,5 in a wallpaper app with no home-automation UI or metadata mention (description.txt only mentions wallpapers) — may trigger review questions.
Pierre: Apple restricts HomeKit to apps offering genuine home-automation functionality, and instantiating HMHomeManager triggers a home-data permission prompt that reviewers will question in a wallpaper app. I found the import and manager in WallpaperGridView.swift with zero home-related features in the UI or metadata. Remove the HomeKit import and HMHomeManager instance, or add and document a real home-automation feature before submission.
